items.boundary: 247 seeds / 696 SFT rows / 2100 DPO pairs; train/dev/test = 282/207/207
items.summary: Current formal public-sample data boundary.
items.conclusion: Current data boundary only; not a model-quality claim.

items.boundary: Recovered step-matched Control/Treatment dev/test prediction contracts and dev/test gold contracts.
items.summary: Decision PARTIAL_SCHEMA_BENEFIT; derived-field-only strict failures 14.65%; metadata-only 0%; V2 core exact improves slightly; V2 executable pass does not improve; core slot failures remain dominant.
items.conclusion: Architecture projection evidence only; not model improvement or Contract V2 implementation approval.

items.boundary: One-seed step-matched Control/Treatment SFT-only ablation with matched 3132 optimizer steps.
items.summary: Mixed / statistically inconclusive result; no stable general canonical-slot data benefit.
items.conclusion: Current latest model experiment; no DPO, no candidate-loop continuation, no adapter/checkpoint release.

items.boundary: Recovered public-safe prediction contracts and gold contracts; 207 dev rows and 207 test rows.
items.summary: RECOVERED_FROM_EXISTING_ARTIFACTS; boundary and metric reproduction passed.
items.conclusion: Raw/reproducibility input evidence for projection; not a projection, training, or model-quality claim.

items.boundary: Initial Contract V2 projection attempt before current raw contracts were recovered.
items.summary: PROJECTION_BLOCKED_OR_INVALID because current raw Control/Treatment dev/test prediction contracts and aligned dev/test gold contracts were missing.
items.conclusion: Blocked evidence preserved; replaced by recovered-input rerun.

items.boundary: Earlier paired SFT ablation before the later optimizer-step matched comparison.
items.summary: Historical paired-SFT evidence; useful background, but no longer the current canonical-slot causal result.
items.conclusion: Superseded by the step-matched canonical-slot ablation.

items.boundary: Formal data merge that produced the current 247 / 696 / 2100 public sample boundary.
items.summary: Promoted seven reviewed train-only canonical slot-boundary candidates into the formal public sample.
items.conclusion: Current data-boundary evidence only; no training, prediction, or model-quality claim.

items.boundary: Proposal/readiness evidence before row-level candidates and formal merge were available.
items.summary: Prior proposal failed closed with formal_merge_ready_now=false.
items.conclusion: Superseded by row-level materialization and formal merge evidence.

items.boundary: Standalone candidate rows before formal promotion.
items.summary: Seven train-only standalone candidate seed rows and 21 report-local SFT preview rows.
items.conclusion: Superseded by the canonical slot-boundary formal merge.

items.boundary: Current-boundary prediction baseline attempt.
items.summary: Blocked before A100 prediction; no current model metrics.
items.conclusion: Blocked execution-status evidence only.

items.boundary: Prior scaled-manifest prediction baseline attempt before A100 recovery.
items.summary: Blocked prediction baseline evidence with no current model metrics; later recovered by a separate retry.
items.conclusion: Historical blocked evidence, not current model metrics.

items.boundary: Prior-manifest prediction-only baseline after A100 recovery.
items.summary: Observed model evidence on an older manifest boundary.
items.conclusion: Historical; not directly comparable to the current formal data boundary.

items.boundary: Design-only policy analysis.
items.summary: Explains slot-key/slot-value/normalized-command policy boundaries.
items.conclusion: Design-only; no data, training, evaluator, or model improvement claim.

items.boundary: Design-only safety repair candidate analysis.
items.summary: Public-safe design themes anchored by observed unsafe false-negative evidence.
items.conclusion: Design-only; no seed materialization, training, evaluator change, or model improvement claim.

items.boundary: Design-only scaled clarify slot-boundary candidate analysis.
items.summary: Candidate themes for clarify slot-boundary cases.
items.conclusion: Design-only; not current model evidence and not a current recommended next change.

items.boundary: Strategic design-only evidence for scaled data and tiered evaluation.
items.summary: Planning evidence only.
items.conclusion: Design-only; no public sample mutation or model improvement claim.

items.boundary: Earlier formal held-out prediction evidence.
items.summary: Historical prediction-only evidence on an older public-sample boundary.
items.conclusion: Historical; not the current snapshot.

items.boundary: Prior private A100 train-split SFT retry evidence.
items.summary: Historical model evidence before the current canonical slot-boundary formal data boundary.
items.conclusion: Historical; no current held-out recovery or release claim.

items.boundary: Earlier SFT v3 retry evidence.
items.summary: Historical setup/model evidence from an older manifest boundary.
items.conclusion: Historical; not current model evidence.

items.boundary: Archived OpenSpec proposal/design/task history.
items.summary: Durable change lifecycle records for completed and superseded phases.
items.conclusion: Archived process evidence; not runtime model evidence by itself.
